# Move

<img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," alt="Move icon">

<div class="dioxus-icons-widget" data-icon-name="Move" data-svg="&lt;svg xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot; width=&quot;24&quot; height=&quot;24&quot; viewBox=&quot;0 0 24 24&quot; fill=&quot;none&quot; stroke=&quot;currentColor&quot; stroke-width=&quot;2&quot; stroke-linecap=&quot;round&quot; stroke-linejoin=&quot;round&quot;&gt;&lt;path d=&quot;M12 2v20&quot;&gt;&lt;/path&gt;&lt;path d=&quot;m15 19-3 3-3-3&quot;&gt;&lt;/path&gt;&lt;path d=&quot;m19 9 3 3-3 3&quot;&gt;&lt;/path&gt;&lt;path d=&quot;M2 12h20&quot;&gt;&lt;/path&gt;&lt;path class="dioxus-icons-widget-controls"><label><span class="dioxus-icons-widget-label">Size</span><input data-di-size="true" type="number" min="1" max="256" value="24"></label><label><span class="dioxus-icons-widget-label">Color</span><input data-di-color="true" type="color" value="#000000"></label><label><span class="dioxus-icons-widget-label">Stroke</span><input data-di-stroke="true" class="a-s">&quot;#000000&quot;</span><span class="a-p">,</span><span> </span><span class="a-pr">stroke_width</span><span class="a-p">:</span><span> </span><span class="a-co">2</span><span> data-di-copy-label="true">Copy RSX</span></button></div></div>

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::Move;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        Move { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
arrows

## Categories
arrows, cursors

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/move)
